scenarios.title: Feature Development
scenarios.description: Building a new REST API endpoint with tests

scenarios.title: Bug Investigation
scenarios.description: Diagnosing and fixing a production authentication issue

scenarios.title: Code Refactoring
scenarios.description: Migrating a legacy module to TypeScript

steps.action: Read requirements doc and ticket
Explore codebase to find patterns
Write API endpoint boilerplate
Implement business logic
Write unit tests manually
Look up API docs and fix errors
Create PR and address review comments

painPoints: Significant time spent navigating unfamiliar code
Context switching between docs, IDE, and browser

steps.action: Describe feature to Cursor Agent with ticket context
Agent explores codebase and proposes implementation plan
Review and refine generated endpoint + tests
Inline fixes with codebase-aware suggestions
Run tests, agent fixes failures iteratively
Create PR with AI-generated description
Reproduce bug from ticket description
Trace through auth middleware chain
Search Slack and wikis for similar issues
Identify root cause in token validation
Write fix and regression test
Verify fix across environments

painPoints: Long investigation time across distributed auth logic
Tribal knowledge required to navigate codebase

steps.action: Paste error logs and ask Agent to diagnose
Agent traces auth flow and identifies root cause
Review proposed fix with inline diffs
Agent generates regression test suite
Verify fix, agent handles edge cases

improvements: Agent understands full auth middleware chain instantly

steps.action: Audit legacy JS module structure
Create TypeScript interfaces manually
Convert files one-by-one to TypeScript
Fix type errors across dependent files
Update imports across codebase
Run full test suite and fix breakages

painPoints: Cascading type errors across many files
High risk of missing dependent file updates

steps.action: Instruct Agent to migrate module to TypeScript
Agent generates types from existing JS patterns
Batch convert files with agent oversight
Agent resolves type errors across dependents
Review changes, run test suite
